annual_rate.notes: Indiana prejudgment interest is 8% for contract, written-instrument, and account claims (IC 24-4.6-1-103). SEPARATELY, tort/personal-injury prejudgment interest is set at the court's discretion within a 6%–10% per-year band (simple) under IC 34-51-4-9 — the 8% figure does not apply to tort claims. Verified 2026-07-11. Not legal advice.
